mnemonics: Think of Bitcoin as a Digital Ledger on a B.I.T. Chain: B - Built on blockchain, I - Immutable transactions, T - Trustless system
keyPoints: Bitcoin is a decentralized digital currency
It operates on a peer-to-peer network without a central authority
Transactions are verified by network nodes through cryptography and recorded in a public distributed ledger called a blockchain
commonMistakes: Confusing Bitcoin the network with bitcoin the currency unit
Belving Bitcoin is stored in a digital wallet (wallets store keys, not coins)
